intro: I am excited to apply for the Data Engineer contract role at K Anand Corporation. The position aligns closely with my experience in Python/SQL data engineering, REST-based integrations, and production pipeline development in enterprise environments.
body: In my recent role at CITI, I built and maintained large-scale ETL workflows using Python, Pandas, and SQL, including ingestion and processing across 6,000+ telemetry endpoints. I developed reusable modules and automation scripts, improved data quality validation, and supported operational reliability for analytics and reporting consumers.

I bring strong software design fundamentals, practical experience with structured and semi-structured data formats (including JSON and Parquet), and a collaborative platform-support mindset. I am comfortable working under tight timelines, partnering with stakeholders, and delivering maintainable, production-ready solutions.
I would value the opportunity to contribute to your team with hands-on engineering execution and dependable delivery in this long-term engagement.
conclusion: Thank you for your consideration. I look forward to discussing how my background can support your data platform and pipeline goals.
